title: Prestone Screenwash Concentrate 2.5L, Screen Wash For Cars - Winter, High Performance Cleaning With Streak Free Formula, Extreme Performance Super Concentrated Screenwash, Reduce Plastic, 2.5 Litre
features: SCREENWASH CONCENTRATE: Introducing Prestone Extreme Performance Screen Wash, a super-concentrated windscreen washer fluid that’s tough enough to tackle driving conditions all year round - it’ll make light work of whatever the weather sends your way.

HIGH PERFORMANCE CLEANING: Prestone Screenwash Winter ensures maximum cleaning power to remove stubborn dirt from your windscreen. It helps you drive in extreme conditions all year, by melting ice down to -18ᵒC and preventing dangerous sun dazzle.

SMALL BUT MIGHTY: All the cleaning agents present in our ready-to-use screen wash are squeezed into this Extreme Performance bottle, so it’s strong enough to take on the dirt and road film, with a guaranteed streak-free finish.

VERSATILE WINDSCREEN WASH: With our Concentrate Screen Wash, you dilute it to suit the season or conditions. As a guide - in winter use neat, autumn 1 part screenwash to 9 parts water, and in spring/summer 1 part screen wash to 19 parts water.

OVER 90 YEARS OF EXCELLENCE: At Prestone, we have spent nearly a century offering solutions to your car troubles to make your life stress free. If you want vehicle oils & fluids to protect your vehicle and maximise performance, we have what you need.
description: Prestone Extreme Performance Screen Wash ensures maximum cleaning power to remove stubborn dirt from your windscreen. It also helps you drive in extreme conditions all year round, by melting ice down to -18ᵒC and preventing dangerous sun dazzle
